completed_tasks: Removed the complete src/app/quiz App Router segment and its route-local IntervalQuiz component.
Removed the complete src/app/chords App Router segment and its route-local Chord and PlayButton components.
Removed only the Chords and Quiz entries from the shared primary navigation.

notes: The implementation follows the vercel:nextjs App Router convention: removing a segment's page.tsx removes the public route.
No redirects, replacement pages, dependencies, CSS rules, semantic classes, or styling changes were added.
React best-practices review found no new component, hook, accessibility, performance, or TypeScript risk; the sole surviving TSX edit removes two static navigation entries.
